description: Credit-ECOA mirror. Root record for a consumer-credit application. Orchestrator-emitted: the scoring decision, underwriting verdict, and adverse-action notice reference this by applicationId. The creditor of record (the lending institution) is bound here; it is the party on whom the ECOA §1002.9 notice obligation falls, not the bureau or the scoring vendor. Notarize-only.

creditorName.description: The creditor of record — carries the ECOA notice obligation.

applicantRef.description: Internal reference to the applicant (no PII on-chain).
